title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.070 - May remove records, when
text:
483.070.  May remove records, when. — In case of danger from an invading enemy any clerk may remove the records, papers and other things appertaining to his office to some secure place until the danger is removed.
(RSMo 1939 § 13294) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11675; 1919 § 2121; 1909 § 2684
